all.en: TO: All Employees
all.zh: 致：全體員工

all.en: FROM: IT Service Desk
all.zh: 來自：IT 服務台

all.en: SUBJECT: New Self-Service Password Reset Portal Launch
all.zh: 主旨：新版自助式密碼重設入口正式上線

all.en: DATE: Effective Monday, June 2
all.zh: 日期：自六月二日週一起生效

all.en: We are pleased to announce a major improvement to account management.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布帳號管理的重大改善。

all.en: Starting next Monday, you can reset your password without contacting the help desk.
all.zh: 自下週一起，您可以無需聯繫服務台即可重設密碼。

all.en: The new portal is available twenty-four hours a day from any device.
all.zh: 新入口全天候二十四小時開放，可從任何裝置存取。

all.en: This change will significantly reduce average wait times for support tickets.
all.zh: 此項變更將大幅縮短支援工單的平均等待時間。

all.en: Before using the service, you must complete a one-time enrollment process.
all.zh: 使用此服務前，您必須完成一次性的註冊程序。

all.en: Please visit the company intranet and click the Security Profile icon.
all.zh: 請進入公司內部網站並點選「安全性設定」圖示。

all.en: You will be prompted to verify your identity using your current credentials.
all.zh: 系統將要求您使用目前的帳號密碼驗證身分。

all.en: Next, register at least two recovery methods for future authentication.
all.zh: 接著，請註冊至少兩種未來驗證所需的救援方式。

all.en: Recommended methods include a mobile phone number and a personal email address.
all.zh: 建議的方式包含行動電話號碼以及個人電子郵件信箱。

all.en: You may also choose three security questions from the provided list.
all.zh: 您也可以從提供的清單中選擇三個安全問題。

all.en: Answers should be memorable but difficult for others to guess.
all.zh: 答案應易於記憶但難以被他人猜測。

all.en: We strongly encourage enabling the Microsoft Authenticator app for added security.
all.zh: 我們強烈建議啟用 Microsoft Authenticator 應用程式以提升安全性。

all.en: This app generates a six-digit code that refreshes every thirty seconds.
all.zh: 此應用程式每三十秒更新一次六位數驗證碼。

all.en: Once enrolled, you can reset your password from the login screen.
all.zh: 完成註冊後，您可從登入畫面直接重設密碼。

all.en: Simply click the link labeled Forgot Password under the sign-in box.
all.zh: 只要點選登入框下方標示「忘記密碼」的連結即可。

all.en: Enter your corporate email address and select a recovery option.
all.zh: 輸入您的公司電子郵件並選擇一種救援方式。

all.en: A verification code will be sent to your registered device immediately.
all.zh: 驗證碼將立即傳送至您註冊的裝置。

all.en: Enter the code within ten minutes before it expires.
all.zh: 請在十分鐘內輸入驗證碼，逾期將失效。

all.en: Then create a new password that meets our complexity requirements.
all.zh: 接著建立一組符合複雜度要求的新密碼。

all.en: Passwords must contain at least twelve characters with mixed case letters.
all.zh: 密碼必須至少十二個字元並包含大小寫字母。

all.en: Please include numbers and special symbols such as exclamation marks or hashes.
all.zh: 請包含數字以及驚嘆號或井字號等特殊符號。

all.en: Avoid using your name, birthday, or common dictionary words.
all.zh: 請勿使用您的姓名、生日或常見的字典單字。

all.en: The system will reject passwords used within the last twelve months.
all.zh: 系統將拒絕過去十二個月內使用過的密碼。

all.en: After confirmation, your new password becomes active across all linked systems.
all.zh: 確認後，新密碼將於所有連結系統同步生效。

all.en: This includes email, VPN, SSO portals, and shared drives.
all.zh: 包括電子郵件、VPN、單一登入入口以及共用磁碟。

all.en: You may need to update saved credentials on mobile devices manually.
all.zh: 您可能需要手動更新行動裝置上儲存的登入資訊。

all.en: If you forget your password and have not enrolled, please call extension 5555.
all.zh: 若您忘記密碼且尚未註冊，請撥打分機 5555。

all.en: Our agents are available Monday through Friday from eight to six.
all.zh: 服務人員週一至週五上午八點至下午六點提供服務。

all.en: For after-hours emergencies, leave a voicemail or submit a ticket online.
all.zh: 非上班時間緊急狀況請留言或線上提交工單。

all.en: Suspicious account activity should be reported within fifteen minutes of discovery.
all.zh: 可疑的帳號活動應於發現後十五分鐘內回報。

all.en: Never share your password with colleagues, even temporary contractors.
all.zh: 切勿與同事分享密碼，即使是臨時約聘人員也不可。

all.en: Our IT staff will never ask for your password over the phone.
all.zh: 我們的 IT 人員絕不會透過電話索取您的密碼。

all.en: Be cautious of emails requesting credential confirmation through external links.
all.zh: 對於要求透過外部連結確認帳密的郵件請保持警覺。

all.en: Forward suspicious messages to the address phishing at company dot com.
all.zh: 可疑訊息請轉寄至 phishing 加公司網域的信箱。

all.en: Password expiration has been extended from sixty to ninety days.
all.zh: 密碼到期週期已從六十天延長為九十天。

all.en: You will receive reminder notifications starting two weeks before expiration.
all.zh: 您將於到期前兩週開始收到提醒通知。

all.en: Please update your password promptly to avoid being locked out.
all.zh: 請及時更新密碼以避免帳號遭鎖定。

all.en: Accounts locked due to expired passwords require self-service unlock first.
all.zh: 因密碼過期而鎖定的帳號需先透過自助服務解鎖。

all.en: Multifactor authentication will be mandatory for all employees by July first.
all.zh: 多重要素驗證將於七月一日前對全體員工強制實施。

all.en: This added layer protects against unauthorized access from stolen passwords.
all.zh: 此額外防護層可防止因密碼遭竊而導致的未授權存取。

all.en: Training videos are available on the Learning Hub under IT Security.
all.zh: 教學影片可於學習中心的「IT 安全」分類下取得。

all.en: Each video is approximately five minutes long and includes captions.
all.zh: 每部影片約五分鐘且附有字幕。

all.en: We recommend completing the tutorials before your first password change.
all.zh: 我們建議於首次變更密碼前完成教學課程。

all.en: Frequently asked questions are posted on the support knowledge base.
all.zh: 常見問題已發布於支援知識庫中。

all.en: You can also chat with our virtual assistant Iris during business hours.
all.zh: 您也可在上班時間與虛擬助理 Iris 對話。

all.en: Feedback on the new portal can be submitted via the survey link.
all.zh: 對於新入口的意見回饋可透過問卷連結提交。

all.en: We will host two live demonstration sessions next Wednesday afternoon.
all.zh: 下週三下午我們將舉辦兩場現場示範說明會。

all.en: Registration is open through the calendar invitation already sent.
all.zh: 報名已透過先前寄發的行事曆邀請開放。

all.en: Thank you for helping us strengthen our overall cybersecurity posture.
all.zh: 感謝您協助強化我們整體的網路安全防護。

all.en: Together, we can reduce risks and protect sensitive company data.
all.zh: 齊心協力，我們可以降低風險並保護敏感的公司資料。

all.en: We appreciate your cooperation during this important security upgrade.
all.zh: 感謝您在此重要安全升級期間的配合。
